description: CompositionRed, white and navy checked shirt with yellow and blue highlights, made of washed 100% cotton, has a spread collar, a full front button placket, short sleeves with cuff and button tab, shaped yoke at front, double contrast top-stitching, buttoned flap pockets and a curved hemFitMid FitWash careMachine wash inside out with like colours Do not bleach, tumble dry or dry cleanCool iron inside outCool surfing brand quiksilver has a great range of casual clothing to suit style conscious dressers who have active lifestyles. Wear this shirt with jeans and comfortable footwear from the wide collection available at myntra.Model statisticsThe product is a size L on a model of height 6' and shoulder 18”
